description_long: This object is a vintage portable radio and cassette player, featuring a rectangular body with a beige front panel and a dark, weathered back and sides. The front displays a large circular speaker grille, a cassette tape slot, a tuning window with frequency markings, and several red and black control buttons. A sturdy, greenish handle spans the top, allowing for easy carrying, while a large tuning knob is visible on the right side. The back is mostly plain, with a circular vent and a faint atomic-style emblem, showing signs of wear and age. The overall design is utilitarian, with functional elements and minimal decorative features, evoking a retro, utilitarian aesthetic.
description: A vintage, rectangular portable radio and cassette player with a beige front, dark weathered sides, a large speaker, and a green handle. It features control buttons, a tuning window, and a cassette slot.
description_view_0: Front view shows the beige panel with a large speaker grille, cassette slot, tuning window, control buttons, and branding.
description_view_1: Right side view reveals the dark, worn surface and a large tuning knob protruding from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a mostly plain, dark surface with a circular vent and atomic-style emblem, plus the handle spanning the top.
description_view_3: Left side view shows the dark, weathered surface and the edge of the handle and control buttons.
attribute_inscription: There are visible inscriptions on the front panel, including frequency markings above the tuning window, a brand logo and text near the speaker, and labels for the cassette slot and buttons. The text is in English and is mostly legible.
attribute_ornamentation: None visible; the design is functional with minimal decorative elements.
attribute_base_design: The base is flat and rectangular, matching the overall body, with no visible decorative features or steps. It appears to be made of the same plastic as the rest of the body.
attribute_tip_design: The top is flat with a sturdy, greenish handle attached, and several control buttons; there are no pointed or uniquely decorated features.
